title: Silkless Touch
description: Makes a ton of blocks minable without silk touch.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ef68d323d0aae57e3794691f71da624527d646e.png)

This data pack makes more items drop in their regular form, as if you had silk touch. The items include - glass, ender chests, campfires and much more. Every other block has been reserved for the [challenge version](https://modrinth.com/datapack/silkless-touch-challenge), since they make the game almost unbeatable.

## Minable Blocks
- All types of Glass
- All types of Glass Panes
- All Corals
- All Coral Fans
- All Dead Corals [Requires a Pickaxe]
- All sculk blocks
- Packed Ice
- Blue Ice
- Soul Campfire
- Campfire
- Chiseled Bookshelf
- Small Budding Amethyst
- Medium Budding Amethyst
- Large Budding Amethyst
- Turtle Egg
